metadata.title: Curated Star Wars Quote List
metadata.scope: Short, curated Star Wars quote snippets across films, selected TV series, games, and a Chewbacca vocalization section.
metadata.copyright_note: This is a copyright-conscious curated collection, not a comprehensive transcript, subtitle dump, or exhaustive dialogue database. Longer memorable moments are intentionally omitted or shortened.
metadata.accuracy_note: Best-effort attributions from widely known Star Wars dialogue. Verify exact wording against licensed scripts/subtitles before publishing commercially.
metadata.wookiee_note: Chewbacca entries are phonetic approximations rather than official spellings. Yes, the rrrrrrrrr made the cut. The Wookiee lobby can stand down.

schema.era: Grouping such as Prequel Trilogy, Original Trilogy, Television, etc.
schema.source: Film, show, game, or recurring source.
schema.medium: Film, TV Series, Game/Expanded Universe, or Film/TV.
schema.continuity: Canon, Mixed/Legends, or other continuity note.
schema.quote: Short quote snippet or approximate vocalization.

quotes.quote: Fear is the path to the dark side.
Wipe them out. All of them.
Yousa in big doo-doo this time.
At last we will reveal ourselves to the Jedi.
Always two there are. No more, no less.
Promise me you will train the boy.
The ability to speak does not make you intelligent.

quotes.quote: Have you heard the tragedy of Darth Plagueis the Wise?
Help me, Obi-Wan Kenobi. You're my only hope.
I find your lack of faith disturbing.
The Force will be with you. Always.
These aren't the droids you're looking for.
The Force is strong with this one.
Aren't you a little short for a stormtrooper?
Will somebody get this big walking carpet out of my way?
I have a very bad feeling about this.
Traveling through hyperspace ain't like dusting crops, boy.
Only a master of evil, Darth.
In my experience, there's no such thing as luck.
This will be a day long remembered.
I am fluent in over six million forms of communication.
What an incredible smell you've discovered!
You came in that thing? You're braver than I thought.

quotes.quote: Do. Or do not. There is no try.

quotes.quote: Your faith in your friends is yours.

quotes.quote: It's against my programming to impersonate a deity.

quotes.quote: Many Bothans died to bring us this information.

quotes.quote: Never. I'll never turn to the dark side.

quotes.source: Episode VI: Return of the Jedi

quotes.quote: Tell your sister you were right.

quotes.quote: I will not fight you, Father.

quotes.source: Episode VI: Return of the Jedi
quotes.quote: Sister! So, you have a twin sister.

quotes.quote: There is still good in him.

quotes.quote: The Emperor is not as forgiving as I am.

Episode VI: Return of the Jedi
quotes.quote: I think my eyes are getting better.

quotes.quote: Everything is proceeding as I have foreseen.
That's not how the Force works!
I will finish what you started.
The belonging you seek is not behind you.
Women always figure out the truth.
The Force, it's calling to you.
Without the Jedi, there can be no balance.
Because it's the right thing to do.
Darkness rises, and light to meet it.
You're nothing. But not to me.
Amazing. Every word of what you just said was wrong.
I will not be the last Jedi.
Permission to jump in an X-wing and blow something up?

quotes.quote: There is more than one sort of prison.
I've got a really good feeling about this.
Everything you've heard about me is true.
I don't like it. I don't agree with it.
You might want to buckle up, baby.
I might be the only person who knows what you really are.
I'm a driver. And I'm a flyer.
Let me give you some advice.
I am not just another number!
In my book, experience outranks everything.
This is a new day, a new beginning.
I know what I have to do.
Then you will die braver than most.
Anakin Skywalker was weak. I destroyed him.
There are some things far more frightening than death.
The Force is in all things.
May the Force be with you.
I can bring you in warm, or I can bring you in cold.
Weapons are part of my religion.
Bad news. You can't live here anymore.
May the Force be with you.
I intend to rule with respect.
You didn't kill Anakin Skywalker. I did.
Then my friend is truly dead.
Have you come to destroy me, Obi-Wan?
I am what you made me.
Oppression is the mask of fear.
When have we ever followed orders?
We do not leave our own behind.
To defeat your enemy, you must know them.
Perhaps it is time to begin again.
Impatience for victory will guarantee defeat.
